description: Create a content slide on economy expectations with a horizontal stacked bar chart showing likely vs unlikely outcomes and 2023 comparison notes in a full-width layout.

header.headline: Economy
header.sub: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

labels: Prices in [COUNTRY] will increase faster than people's incomes
Taxes in [COUNTRY] will be higher in 2025 than in 2024
Inflation in [COUNTRY] will be higher in 2025 than in 2024
Unemployment in [COUNTRY] will be higher in 2025 than in 2024
Interest rates in [COUNTRY] will be higher in 2025 than in 2024
main.title: Global averages

footer.source: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024. © Ipsos Predictions 2025 Report
